// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance PermafrostTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision temperature sensor deployed in permafrost regions to measure ground thermal state with ±0.1°C accuracy at 15-minute intervals"

]

instance SoilMoistureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Capacitance-based soil moisture sensor with 3% volumetric water content resolution, sampling every 30 minutes in active layer"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SoilMoistureDataTransmitted
]

    base:desc "Acoustic depth sensor measuring active layer thickness with ±2cm precision, triggered by temperature threshold crossings"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ThawDepthDataTransmitted
]

instance MethaneFluxChamber : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Closed-path eddy covariance chamber measuring CH4 emissions at 1Hz frequency with 0.1ppm resolution"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MethaneFluxDataTransmitted
]

instance VegetationCanopyCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Multispectral camera (450-900nm) capturing NDVI and canopy structure at 10-minute intervals during daylight"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VegetationCanopyDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance PermafrostTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [

]

instance SoilMoistureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SoilMoistureSensor
]

instance ThawDepthDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ThawDepthProbe
]

instance MethaneFluxDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MethaneFluxChamber
]

instance VegetationCanopyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VegetationCanopyCamera
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PermafrostThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Finite difference heat transfer model with phase change capability, parameterized by soil thermal properties and boundary conditions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PermafrostModelEnabler
]

instance SoilMoistureBalanceModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Richard's equation-based model accounting for frost heave and capillary effects in unsaturated zone"

]

instance MethaneEmissionsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Process-based model combining microbial kinetics, substrate availability, and temperature dependence (Q10=2.5)"

]

instance VegetationProductivityModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Light-use efficiency model with temperature acclimation parameters for Arctic tundra species"

]

instance PermafrostTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series temperature measurements at 10cm, 30cm, and 100cm depths with metadata including sensor calibration coefficients"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PermafrostTemperatureDataTransmitted

]

instance SoilMoistureData : DTDFVocab:Data [

]

instance ThawDepthData : DTDFVocab:Data [

instance MethaneFluxData : DTDFVocab:Data [

    DTDFVocab:fromData MethaneFluxDataTransmitted

]

instance VegetationCanopyData : DTDFVocab:Data [

    DTDFVocab:inputTo VegetationEnabler, PhenologyTrackingEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PermafrostModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "High-performance computing cluster with parallelized finite difference solver and GPU-accelerated phase change calculations"

]

]

]

]

]
